gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/511)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/511)

parts.text: الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيِّ بْنِ أَبِي حَمْزَةَ

text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) إِنَّ سُورَةَ الْأَنْعَامِ نَزَلَتْ جُمْلَةً شَيَّعَهَا سَبْعُونَ أَلْفَ مَلَكٍ حَتَّى أُنْزِلَتْ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) فَعَظَّمُوهَا وَ بَجَّلُوهَا فَإِنَّ اسْمَ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فِيهَا فِي سَبْعِينَ مَوْضِعاً وَ لَوْ يَعْلَمُ النَّاسُ مَا فِي قِرَاءَتِهَا مَا تَرَكُوهَا .

en.hubeali: From him, from Al Hassan Bin Ali Bin Abu Hamza, raising it, said,

‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Surah Al-Anam (Chapter 6) was Revealed in its totality. Seventy thousand Angels escorted it until it was Revealed unto Muhammad<sup>saww</sup>. Therefore, you should magnify it and revere it, for the Name of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic is in it in seventy places, and had the people known what is in its recitation, they would not be neglecting it’.
en.sarwar: 12. It is narrated from him (narrator of the Hadith above) from al-Hassan ibn Ali ibn abu Hamza in a marfu’ manner from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Chapter six ( al-An ’am) was revealed all in one piece escorted by seventy thousand angels until it came down upon Muhammad, recipient of divine supreme covenant. You must maintain its greatness and respect it. The name of Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Holy, is mentioned therein at seventy places. Had people known what is in reading it, they would not have ignored it.”
